compiled_state.title: As a developer, a CLI-focused guide documents @playwright/cli patterns for all browser automation
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Remove PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md and create a replacement CLI-focused guide documenting: (a) the full set of @playwright/cli commands used across the 5 migrated skills with example Bash invocations, (b) disk-based output patterns showing how results are read back into the agent, (c) a command selection reference for low- vs high-fidelity needs, (d) session naming conventions, (e) pre-flight checks and output validation patterns, (f) CI environment considerations (--no-sandbox, browser install).
**Why**: The existing guide documents MCP patterns that no longer apply after migration. A CLI-focused guide ensures future development follows the established patterns.
**Scope**:
- IN: Remove PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md; create replacement guide; update all cross-references in skills and docs that point to the old guide; update playwright-debug-reference.example.md template
- OUT: Creating new skills or tools; changing CLI behavior

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md is removed and a CLI-focused guide exists with command reference, output patterns, and command selection reference
  ← Satisfies: "PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md is replaced with a CLI-focused guide"
- When this story is complete, no file in the repository references PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md
  ← Satisfies: "PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md is replaced with a CLI-focused guide"

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] All 5 skill migration stories must complete before the guide can document final patterns
- [Maintainability] Update playwright-debug-reference.example.md to reference CLI patterns

comments.body: Story complete: MCP guide removed, CLI guide created, cross-references updated
comments.author: Test
